name: Marco Polo

skills.name: Chain Reaction
skills.description: Basic Attack and skill hits inflict stacks on the opponent, dealing extra truedamage at max stacks. Extra Attack Speed bonuses increase the number ofbullets fired by Skill 1 and 3.

skills.name: Resplendent Revolver
skills.description: Fires in the target direction for a period of time and gains increasedMovement Speed while firing.

skills.name: Roaming Gun
skills.description: Teleports in the target direction.Passive: Gains Attack and Movement Speed when a nearby enemy hero is within range.

skills.name: Fevered Barrage
skills.description: Shifts in the target direction and deals damage over time to nearby enemies within range.

tips: Marco Polo (Marksman): Tier S+ on international ranked — 50.06% WR.
Build core: Boots of Dexterity, Dagger, Sparkforged Dagger.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.06%, pick 2.12%, ban 0.3%, popularity tier S+.
Counters Cirrus, Mai Shiranui, Wukong · Weak into Lian Po, Liu Bang, Zhang Fei.

faqs.question: Is Marco Polo good in current season?
faqs.answer: Marco Polo is Tier S+ Marksman with 50.06% win rate, 2.12% pick rate, and 0.3% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Marco Polo build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Dexterity, Dagger, Sparkforged Dagger, Swiftstrike Lance, Doomsday, Belt of Might. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Marco Polo?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Marco Polo: Lian Po, Liu Bang, Zhang Fei. Marco Polo is strong into Cirrus, Mai Shiranui, Wukong.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Mai Shiranui, Wukong. Countered by: Lian Po, Liu Bang, Zhang Fei.
